info.name: FCIB to First Citizens - IPP Full (BPW structure)
info.description: All permutations: CIBC Caribbean (FCIB) debtor accounts × First Citizens creditor accounts. Endpoints match BPW: sendPayment, recallPayment, paymentInvestigation, reqToPay. Each request gets a unique reqId (REQ/REC/ING/RTP + timestamp + random + random string). sendPayment pre-request sets customerIdNumeric from debtor account; Tests save txnId, orgnlReqId for recall/investigation. Regenerate via: python build_fcib_fc_collection.py

item.name: 00_Full_Chain_Reference (FCIB Active → FC Active)
item.description: Run in order: sendPayment → recallPayment → paymentInvestigation → reqToPay

item.name: recallPayment - FC (uses txnId + orgnlReqId from sendPayment)
